name: RPlog_Lady_Alora_Antieres
title: Lady Alora's Temptation
summary: As the New Republic crew argues over a mission -- Han Solo insisting on going alone while Amylynn, Luke, and Leia object -- Jessalyn Valios drags the runaway street kid Shenner aboard and into the fray. Later, meeting the smitten Paul Nighman at the Grand Palanhi Hotel to plan their escape, Jessalyn is confronted by the fallen Force-user Lady Alora Antieres, who -- shadowed by her aide Crimthan and a squad of Espos -- works to seduce Jessalyn to the dark side, promising she could 'save' her brother from Sabbath. With Paul and Shenner physically hauling the wavering, weeping Jessalyn away from Alora's outstretched hand, they flee to the Black Dragon, where Princess Leia takes Jessalyn's hand and gently shields her mind against Alora's lingering psychic intrusion until she finally relaxes into a calmer rest.
